description: Modern hip-hop: heavy sub-bass, crisp snares, upfront vocals, punchy dynamics.
processing_notes: Sub-bass is the foundation. 808s or deep kicks drive the low end. Vocals must cut through clearly -- presence boost at 3-5kHz. Snares and hi-hats provide rhythmic crispness. Keep the mix dry and upfront. Heavy sidechain compression from kick to bass.
